zh.lifeSummary: 當André III de VITRE於1180年出生在法國時，他的父親André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré26歲，母親Eustachie De Rais ou Retz20歲。他於1219年與Catherine de THOUARS結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年2月8日在埃及享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当André III de VITRE于1180年出生在法国时，他的父亲André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré26岁，母亲Eustachie De Rais ou Retz20岁。他于1219年与Catherine de THOUARS结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1250年2月8日在埃及享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: VITRE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Mexico and Argentina): adaptation of a surname such as Greek   Mitropoulos   and Italian   Mitri  .
Albanian and Romanian: from the personal name Mitre, a short form of Albanian Dhimitër, Romanian Dumitru, from classical Greek Dēmētrios (see Dimitris ).

variants.name: Mitropoulos
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Mitros + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese. Compare Metropoulos .

nameMeanings.name: André
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Andrew  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When André III de VITRE was born in 1180, in France, his father, André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré, was 26 and his mother, Eustachie De Rais ou Retz, was 20. He married Catherine de THOUARS in 1219. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 8 daughters. He died on 8 February 1250, in Egypt, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque André III de VITRE est né en 1180, à France, son père, André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eustachie De Rais ou Retz, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de THOUARS en 1219. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1250, à Égypte, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als André III de VITRE 1180 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré 26 und seine Mutter Eustachie De Rais ou Retz 20. Er hat 1219 Catherine de THOUARS geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1250 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Ägypten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando André III de VITRE è nato il nel 1180 nel Francia, il suo padre, André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Eustachie De Rais ou Retz, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Catherine de THOUARS nel 1219. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 8 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1250, nel Egitto, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: André III de VITREが1180年にフランスで生まれた時，父André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitréは26歳，母Eustachie De Rais ou Retzは20歳であった。1219年にCatherine de THOUARSと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1250年2月8日にエジプトで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: André III de VITRE(이)가 1180년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustachie De Rais ou Retz(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1219년 Catherine de THOUARS(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 2월 8일 이집트에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando André III de VITRE nasceu em 1180, em França, seu pai, André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eustachie De Rais ou Retz, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de THOUARS em 1219. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1250, em Egipto, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда André III de VITRE родился в 1180 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustachie De Rais ou Retz, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de THOUARS в 1219 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей. Он умер 8 февраля 1250 г. в местности Египет в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando André III de VITRE nació en 1180, en Francia, su papá, André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eustachie De Rais ou Retz, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Catherine de THOUARS en 1219. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 8 hijas. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1250, en Egipto, a la edad de 70 años.
